name: Eye of Sauron
description: Eye of Sauron is a code quality scanning system integrated into GregLite as lib/eos/. Provides AST-level structural analysis and quality scoring.
purpose: Provide continuous automated code quality scanning across portfolio codebases, feeding quality signals to GregLite and Greg.
success_criteria: EoS health score integrated into GregLite Projects panel
All active codebases scanned on commit
tagline: Code quality scanning — AST-level structural analysis.
notes: Integrated into GregLite as lib/eos/. EoS self-scan score feeds Integration Score formula.
author: dk-001
